headline: Look for 5 green flags when dating, says psychologist: 'Almost anyone' can seem like the 'perfect partner' in the first month
summary: "Almost anyone can put up that facade of being the perfect partner for the first month of dating," says psychologist Sabrina Romanoff. Here are the green flags to look for.
